name: BOSTON SCIENTIFIC  DL-,01
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation is a global medical technology leader, designing, manufacturing, and selling a wide range of medical devices used in interventional medical specialties. The company's products are used in various medical fields, including cardiology, electrophysiology, endoscopy, urology and neuromodulation. Headquartered in Marlborough, Massachusetts, Boston Scientific operates in numerous countries around the world.
